title: ManualCaseSet
description: Executable manual test cases and exploratory charters artifact. Produced by synthesize_manual_cases workflow step.

feature_id.description: Reference to the feature_spec feature_id these cases cover.

manual_cases.description: Scripted manual test cases with steps, expected results, and oracle references.

exploratory_charters.description: Exploratory testing charters for areas with weak oracles or high uncertainty.

ManualTestCase.description: Single scripted manual test case with complete execution instructions.

tc_id.description: Unique test case identifier, e.g., 'TC-001'. Should be sequential within feature.

title.description: Short descriptive title for the test case.

priority.description: Risk-based priority: P0 (critical), P1 (high), P2 (medium), P3 (low).

primary_view.description: Testing view: black (external UI), gray (limited internal), white (full internal).

preconditions.description: Setup conditions required before execution, e.g., '注文状態=pending'.

steps.description: Sequential execution steps. Each should be actionable and specific.

expected_results.description: Observable expected outcomes after each step or at end.

oracle.description: Oracle definition: how expected results are determined.

type.description: Oracle type: specified (in spec), derived (from rules), implicit (standard), human (judgment).

refs.description: References to source for oracle, e.g., ['AC-1', 'BR-2'].

estimate_minutes.description: Estimated execution time in minutes. Used for effort planning.

trace_to.description: Traceability to observations and risks, e.g., ['OBS-STATE-01', 'RISK-01'].

ExploratoryCharter.description: Exploratory testing charter for areas requiring investigation rather than scripted steps.

title.description: Short descriptive title for the charter's focus area.

scope.description: Scope or domain to explore, e.g., 'network loss and retry during cancellation'.

questions.description: Specific questions to answer during exploration.

estimate_minutes.description: Timebox for charter exploration in minutes.
